case_title: KAVEH, FARZIN/ AUTO SYMPHONY et al VS PATRICK MEDIA CORP. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,500.00 FILED BY KAVEH, FARZIN/ AUTO SYMPHONY KAVEH, HEDY / AUTO SYMPHONY AS TO DEFENDANT PATRICK MEDIA CORP. MCWALTER, DAVID MR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-08-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
UNTIMELY SERVICE AS TO PATRICK MEDIA, NOT SERVED 25 DAYS PRIOR HRG. ON SUBSERV. OUT OF COUNTY.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PATRICK MEDIA CORP.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KAVEH, FARZIN/ AUTO SYMPHONY KAVEH, HEDY / AUTO SYMPHONY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PATRICK MEDIA CORP. MCWALTER, DAVID MR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
